baseline.observed: The prompt list sorted from the current PreviewMode control even after a scan result was loaded, so switching Latest/Weakest after a scan could display a different order from the backend preview_sort summary.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because previewMode.ts did not exist.

change.summary: Added preview-mode helpers, made loaded prompt display mode follow ScanResult.preview_sort, kept scan requests tied to the pending control, and added the helper test to npm run check.

verification.result: PASS: 3 Node UI helper tests passed.
PASS: UI helper tests, Vite build, 31 library tests, 13 CLI tests, and strict clippy passed.

safety_controls: No new npm dependency was added.
The test file stays outside src so the app TypeScript build does not require Node type declarations.
The pending Latest/Weakest control still controls the next scan request.
